_comment: OpenClaw integration template values + region allocation policy. Copy to config.json and edit. Values mirror RealityEngine_CPP/config/integrations.example.json (openclaw-xacp + acp-openclaw-completion) and localOpenClawStack docker-compose defaults.

completionRegions._comment: Reserved perceptual-space band for derived agent completion sensors. Each unique agent on a machine is assigned a distinct length-4 region from this band so completions never collide and RE can read each agent's result independently. Production must reserve this band in domains/domain-registry.json rangePolicy before live use.
